name: lookback_boundary_exactly_20
description: Exactly 20 days of data — the minimum the 20-day lookback requires (len(valid_dates) < 20 returns 0.0; len == 20 proceeds). Uses high-vol alternating data so the expected stdev is non-zero; this guarantees that the boundary 'just succeeded' rather than silently fell through to the 0.0 clamp.
derivation: Same construction as high_vol_alternating but amplitude=0.03. daily_returns = +/-3.0, variance = 9.0, std = 3.0. Distinct expected value from the 19-day boundary case (0.0) — they CANNOT collide.
